title: Holiday
description: A public holiday or observance as returned by Holiday API.

name.description: Name of the holiday or observance.

date.description: Calendar date on which the holiday actually occurs (YYYY-MM-DD).

observed.description: Calendar date on which the holiday is observed (YYYY-MM-DD).

public.description: Whether the entry is a public holiday.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, or ISO 3166-2 subdivision code.

uuid.description: Stable identifier for this holiday across years.

subdivisions.description: List of applicable subdivisions. Empty array means all subdivisions apply.
